tools.name: metriport_list_facilities
tools.description: List all Facilities under your Metriport Organization (id, name, npi, address). Medical API: GET /medical/v1/facility.

tools.name: metriport_get_facility
tools.description: Get a single Facility by its Metriport ID. Medical API: GET /medical/v1/facility/{id}.

tools.name: metriport_list_patients
tools.description: List Patients — all Patients, or only those at a given Facility if facilityId is supplied. Medical API: GET /medical/v1/patient.

tools.name: metriport_get_patient
tools.description: Get a single Patient by its Metriport ID (demographics + facility IDs). Medical API: GET /medical/v1/patient/{id}.

tools.name: metriport_list_documents
tools.description: List the document references currently available for a Patient at Metriport (optionally filtered by date range and content search). Medical API: GET /medical/v1/document.

tools.name: metriport_get_document_query_status
tools.description: Check the progress/status of a Patient's document query (download + FHIR conversion counts). Medical API: POST /medical/v1/document/query with only patientId (no facilityId) returns current status without starting a new query.

tools.name: metriport_get_document_url
tools.description: Get a temporary, downloadable URL for a document by its file name (optionally converting XML/CDA to html or pdf). Medical API: GET /medical/v1/document/download-url.

tools.name: metriport_list_consolidated_queries
tools.description: Get the status of the Patient's consolidated-data (FHIR) queries. Medical API: GET /medical/v1/patient/{id}/consolidated/query.

tools.name: metriport_get_medical_record_summary
tools.description: Get a URL to the Patient's medical record summary rendered as pdf or html. Medical API: GET /medical/v1/patient/{patientId}/medical-record.

tools.name: metriport_create_patient
tools.description: Creates a Patient in Metriport (writes PHI and initiates health-information-exchange queries). Medical API: POST /medical/v1/patient (facilityId is a required query param).

tools.name: metriport_start_document_query
tools.description: Starts a document query — retrieves the patient's medical documents from connected HIE networks. Returns a requestId; results arrive asynchronously. Medical API: POST /medical/v1/document/query (patientId and facilityId are required query params).

tools.name: metriport_start_consolidated_query
tools.description: Starts a consolidated-data (FHIR) query for the patient. Returns a requestId; the bundle is delivered asynchronously (webhook). Medical API: POST /medical/v1/patient/{id}/consolidated/query.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: metriport_get_document_query_status, metriport_get_document_url, metriport_get_medical_record_summary · Private data: metriport_list_documents, metriport_get_document_query_status, metriport_get_document_url, metriport_get_medical_record_summary, metriport_start_document_query · Public sink: metriport_get_document_query_status, metriport_create_patient, metriport_start_document_query, metriport_start_consolidated_query.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: metriport_get_document_query_status, metriport_get_document_url, metriport_get_medical_record_summary · Private data: metriport_list_documents, metriport_get_document_query_status, metriport_get_document_url, metriport_get_medical_record_summary, metriport_start_document_query · Public sink: metriport_get_document_query_status, metriport_create_patient, metriport_start_document_query, metriport_start_consolidated_query

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
